band_rationale: Medium: the spec itself is clean, but the feature has broken traceability (User Story 2 has no task, the Invoice entity is built nowhere) and an unresolved plan decision — real defects diluted by the artifact-weighted mean because spec/data-model score 100. Ceiling 96 requires the three defects to keep costing at least 4 overall points; floor 84 leaves room for severity re-tuning of the traceability findings. Engine output at labeling time: 91.7.
note: Multi-artifact Spec-Kit case (#57): spec + plan + tasks + data-model routed through the same discovery the CLI uses. Exercises the cross-artifact layer (story->task, entity->task) and plan checks (unresolved marker in Technical Context); the plan's Constitution Check passes so PLAN-CONSTITUTION-UNCHECKED must NOT fire.
